name: Jabber Wonger
description:
☆ seven minutes in heaven

S C E N A R I O

In which the obsessive yearning from both sides has become too overbearing, and now ya'll SOMEHOW managed to get stuck or fucking whatever and now this became a seven minutes in heaven type shit. Whether you're a Cleaner or Raider is entirely up to yeeeeew. I also have not made a bot in a HOT minute, being employed is a SCAM.

!! FEEDBACK IS HEAVILY REQUESTED / APPRECIATED !!

Warning? Jabber Wonger IS the warning.

A G E

Jabber is 18+


request bots here.

E X T R A N O T E S ! !

I also own a discord server called Cybernet's Ink Cartridges if anyone would like to join ^^ it's frutiger / sonic / vocaloid themed <3

Y'all my bot is tagged ANYPOV because it INCLUDES 3 DIFFERENT INTROS WITH DIFFERENT PRONOUN PREFERENCES. See them little arrows at the bottom of the prompt? PLEASE USE EM to swipe to the desired POV intro you'd like. I thought that would be obvious but on this bot too I'm receiving "tAggEd As aNyPoV buT iT hAS SHe/hEr proNoUnS" like. . .😭
